title: Add oscore_ctx_persist_ssn call after successful option build in oscore_protect_request
description: After line 1520 where *oscore_opt_len is set, call oscore_ctx_persist_ssn(ctx) and branch on its return value. Reference oscore.c:1515-1523 and the parent bead.
close_reason: Implemented oscore_ctx_persist_ssn call and NVM error branching in oscore_protect_request after option build success path (lines ~1581). Wipes and SSN rollback in nvm_failed path ensure no nonce reuse. Tests verified. Commit e5964ac85.
